error.no_provider: No provider configured. Run 'bharatcode configure' first.
error.no_model: No model configured. Run 'bharatcode configure' first.
configure.welcome: Welcome to bharatcode! Let's get you set up.
configure.welcome_hint: you can rerun this command later to update your configuration
configure.presets_hint: Pick a curated local or India-hosted model preset
presets.footer: Run 'bharatcode configure' and choose 'Recommended (India / open-weight)' to set one up.
recipes_library.footer: Run 'bharatcode recipes-library --show <id>' to print a template, then save it and run it with 'bharatcode run --recipe <file>'.
budget.warn: Budget warning ({scope}): spent {spent} of {cap} cap ({pct}). Approaching your limit.
budget.over_warn: Budget exceeded ({scope}): spent {spent} of {cap} cap. Continuing (BHARATCODE_BUDGET_MODE=warn).
budget.deny: Budget limit reached ({scope}): spent {spent} of {cap} cap. Further model turns are blocked. Raise BHARATCODE_BUDGET_INR or set BHARATCODE_BUDGET_MODE=warn to continue.
cost.title: BharatCode cost ledger (INR)
cost.rate: USD -> INR rate: {rate}  (set BHARATCODE_USD_INR to override)
cost.empty: No recorded LLM spend yet. Run a session to start the ledger.
review.no_changes: bharatcode review: no changes to review
review.prompt_instructions: You are reviewing the following git diff. Identify correctness bugs, security issues, and clear simplifications. For each finding, name the file and line, explain the problem, and suggest a fix. Be concise and skip praise. If there are no meaningful issues, say so.
privacy.title: BharatCode privacy posture
privacy.subtitle: Resolved data-governance posture for this session
privacy.locked_down: All pillars locked down: strict residency, offline, redaction on, telemetry off, local provider.
privacy.hint: Tighten posture: BHARATCODE_OFFLINE=1, BHARATCODE_RESIDENCY=strict, BHARATCODE_REDACT=1, BHARATCODE_AUDIT=1.
db.preflight.hint: Warning: the session database may be corrupted.
ecosystem.checksum_failed: Bundle integrity check failed: recipe content does not match its recorded checksum.
onboarding.title: First-run setup checklist
onboarding.intro: Review the four steps below. Nothing changes unless you pass --apply.
onboarding.privacy_locked: fully locked down (strict residency, offline, redaction on, telemetry off, local provider)
onboarding.privacy_offline: offline mode on; no off-machine egress, telemetry off
onboarding.privacy_hosted: hosted provider; telemetry off, residency guard available
onboarding.apply_on: --apply set: your confirmed choices will be written to the config.
onboarding.apply_off: Read-only preview: no files or config were changed. Re-run with --apply to write.
onboarding.tty_hint: Re-run 'bharatcode configure' to change any of these interactively.
onboarding.apply_followup: To persist these choices now, run 'bharatcode configure'.
help.title: Available slash commands
onboarding.apply_hint: Press Enter to apply, or rerun 'bharatcode configure' anytime.
tutorials.quickstart_step1: Run 'bharatcode configure' to pick a provider and model.
tutorials.quickstart_step2: Start a session and type your first request.
tutorials.next_hint: Next: run 'bharatcode tutorials --next' for the following step.
dashboard.title: BharatCode cost dashboard
dashboard.bar_legend: Each bar shows spend per model (INR).
i18n_status.title: BharatCode i18n coverage
i18n_status.all_complete: All locales are at full parity with English.
i18n_status.hint: Add the missing keys to the locale's JSON table to reach 100%.
version.attribution: derivative work, see NOTICE for attribution
